title: Help with creating new integration app
excerpt: I’m trying to build an integration app and while looking at some other apps I noticed that they render fields that I really can’t figure out how to render since the docs don’t cover it and the existing fields don’t rende…

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to build an integration app and while looking at some other apps I noticed that they render fields that I really can’t figure out how to render since the docs don’t cover it and the existing fields don’t render. Please see the below screenshots.

How can I setup my automation recipe to render fields that look like this.

Screenshot 2024-09-05 at 16.12.15902×792 23.5 KB

Screenshot 2024-09-05 at 16.14.071128×448 32.7 KB

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday @dipro Please can you help here? Thank you!

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Figured it out.

The first image can be gotten from using the message or the name field, the second from the email field, the third is from the duration field.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @hellotimi,

I am glad you found the solution
